notice: Codex does not consume Claude hook JSON. HSEOS keeps hook scripts portable and records intent here for audit/manual fallback.

hooks.description: HSEOS SWARM gate: bloqueia Agent paralelo sem run dev-squad ativo (complementa gate global)
hooks.fallback: Use repository scripts or quality gates when the target platform has no native hook event.

hooks.description: Block direct writes/edits to CLAUDE.md; route durable agent rules to AGENTS.md
hooks.fallback: Manual review: keep CLAUDE.md as a pointer and update AGENTS.md instead.

hooks.description: Backup file before any Edit operation
hooks.fallback: Use repository scripts or quality gates when the target platform has no native hook event.

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_COMMAND" | grep -qE '^(git push|git reset --hard|rm -rf|git branch -[Dd])'; then echo '[HSEOS] High-risk command intercepted — confirm this is intentional' >&2; fi
hooks.description: Warn on high-risk bash commands
hooks.fallback: Use repository scripts or quality gates when the target platform has no native hook event.

hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]] && command -v black &>/dev/null; then black "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; elif [[ "$FILE" == *.js || "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.jsx || "$FILE" == *.tsx ]] && command -v prettier &>/dev/null; then prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
hooks.description: Auto-format Python (black) and JS/TS (prettier) after Edit
hooks.fallback: Use repository scripts or quality gates when the target platform has no native hook event.

hooks.description: Emit agent-state tool_call event (best-effort, non-blocking)
hooks.fallback: Use repository scripts or quality gates when the target platform has no native hook event.

hooks.command: echo '--- HSEOS SESSION START ---' && echo 'Constitution: .enterprise/.specs/constitution/Enterprise-Constitution.md' && echo 'Skills: .enterprise/governance/agent-skills/SKILLS-REGISTRY.md' && echo 'Agents: .hseos/AGENT-MANIFEST.md' && echo 'Branch:' $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown') && echo '--- READ CLAUDE.md BEFORE ANY ACTION ---'
hooks.description: Display HSEOS navigation reminder at session start
hooks.fallback: Use repository scripts or quality gates when the target platform has no native hook event.

hooks.description: Emit agent-state start event (best-effort, non-blocking)
hooks.fallback: Use repository scripts or quality gates when the target platform has no native hook event.

hooks.description: Emit agent-state complete event when Claude session ends (best-effort, non-blocking)
hooks.fallback: Use repository scripts or quality gates when the target platform has no native hook event.

hooks.description: Lint plan files for missing Execution Protocol section in parallel-flow plans
hooks.fallback: Manual review during PR.

hooks.description: Snapshot critical context (next steps, open questions) before compaction
hooks.fallback: Manual context export prior to /compact.

hooks.description: Project-scoped prompt logging and state injection (vault concerns stripped vs upstream)
hooks.fallback: No-op when handler absent.

hooks.description: Session-end log; vault sync only when second_brain.enabled true
hooks.fallback: No-op when handler absent.

hooks.description: Recommend skills before Agent spawn based on SKILL.md frontmatter triggers
hooks.fallback: Manual skill selection.

hooks.description: Block raw search when a code index (axon, etc.) is available; pluggable across providers
hooks.fallback: No-op when no code index is configured.

hooks.description: Trigger index reindex after edits; pluggable across code-index providers
hooks.fallback: Manual reindex via provider CLI.

hooks.description: System notification for long-running operations (cross-platform — toast/bell)
hooks.fallback: Terminal bell.

hooks.description: ADO-first gate: warns when Agent dev-squad dispatch has no ADO mapping in PLAN.md. Exits silently when ado.enabled=false.
hooks.fallback: Run /atlas plan to create ADO work items before dispatching dev-squad.

hooks.description: ADO branch guard: blocks direct git push to trunk branches (main/master/develop/trunk/staging/hmg). Exits silently when ado.enabled=false.
hooks.fallback: Create a feature branch and open a PR instead of pushing directly to trunk.

hooks.description: ADO plan advisory: warns when PLAN.md or MASTER-PLAN.md is written without ADO mapping annotations. Non-blocking. Exits silently when ado.enabled=false.
hooks.fallback: Add ADO mapping section to PLAN.md manually or run /atlas plan.

hooks.description: ADO task progress: adds comment to ADO Task and transitions to Active on git commit in ado-{ID}-* branches. Best-effort, never blocks. Exits silently when ado.enabled=false.
hooks.fallback: Update ADO Task state manually via /atlas sync.

hooks.description: ADO PR link: links GitHub PR to ADO Story after gh pr create. Extracts PR URL from output. Best-effort, never blocks. Exits silently when ado.enabled=false.
hooks.fallback: Link PR to ADO Story manually via work item comment.

hooks.description: ADO tag close: emits inbox event when git tag pushed. ATLAS processes inbox via /atlas close to close ADO Feature/Epic. Never calls ADO directly. Exits silently when ado.enabled=false.
hooks.fallback: Run /atlas close manually after tagging to close ADO Feature/Epic.

hooks.description: ADO inbox check: warns at session start if pending tag-close events exist in .hseos/runs/ado-ops/inbox/. Advisory only — directs user to run /atlas close. Exits silently when ado.enabled=false.
hooks.fallback: Check .hseos/runs/ado-ops/inbox/ manually for pending events.

hooks.description: Opt-in OTLP metrics export (TEE of tool events). Self-suppresses unless OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT is set. SQLite remains canonical.
hooks.fallback: No-op when OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT/HSEOS_OTEL_EXPORT unset; SQLite state-emit unaffected.

hooks.description: Opt-in OTLP/Loki session-ended log export. Self-suppresses unless OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT or HSEOS_LOKI_ENDPOINT is set.
hooks.fallback: No-op when no OTLP/Loki endpoint configured; SQLite complete-event unaffected.
